question: Which product category contributes the most to total revenue in the last quarter shown?

options.A: The orange segment (Electronics) shows the largest share.
options.B: The green segment (Clothing) indicates the largest share.
options.C: The red segment (Home goods) shows the largest share.
options.D: Cannot determine which product category contributes the most without a legend to explain what each color represents.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
